title: Claude Fable 5 is Now BANNED?!
summary: Cole Medin discusses the sudden withdrawal of Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 model following a US government export-control directive related to alleged jailbreak vulnerabilities. The video examines the regulatory action, its overnight effect across all customers, and implications for developers building on large language models.
writeup: Cole Medin covers a reported US government order directing Anthropic to shut down Claude Fable 5 three days after its launch, citing export-control directives and the model's jailbreak vulnerability. The video lays out the stated reasoning behind the removal and recounts Medin's own benchmarking of the model before it was pulled. Takeaways include a comparison of Claude Fable 5's performance and cost against Claude Opus 4.8, and the role export controls and jailbreaking played in the decision.
